assert.desc: status type must be one of: response, update
status ext fr-ctc-flow6-status must be a Status-applicable ProcessConditionCode (200-210 or 213); codes 211, 212 belong on bill.Payment
status line key must be a recognised Flow 6 event
assert.tests: one of [issued, acknowledged, processing, accepted, querying, rejected, error]

assert.desc: payment type must be 'advice' (CDAR 211) or 'receipt' (CDAR 212); 'request' is not a Flow 6 CDV event
payment ext fr-ctc-flow6-status must be a Payment-applicable ProcessConditionCode (211 advice or 212 receipt); codes 200-210, 213 belong on bill.Status
payment ext fr-ctc-flow6-condition must be a Payment-applicable CharacteristicTypeCode (MEN, MPA, RAP); status-only codes belong on a bill.Reason under bill.Status
reason ext fr-ctc-flow6-reason must be a known CDAR ReasonCode
assert.tests: ext 'fr-ctc-flow6-reason' in [NON_TRANSMISE, JUSTIF_ABS, ROUTAGE_ERR, AUTRE, COORD_BANC_ERR, TX_TVA_ERR, MONTANTTOTAL_ERR, CALCUL_ERR, NON_CONFORME, DOUBLON, DEST_INC, DEST_ERR, TRANSAC_INC, EMMET_INC, CONTRAT_TERM, DOUBLE_FACT, CMD_ERR, ADR_ERR, SIRET_ERR, CODE_ROUTAGE_ERR, REF_CT_ABSENT, REF_ERR, PU_ERR, REM_ERR, QTE_ERR, ART_ERR, MODPAI_ERR, QUALITE_ERR, LIVR_INCOMP, REJ_SEMAN, REJ_UNI, REJ_COH, REJ_ADR, REJ_CONT_B2G, REJ_REF_PJ, REJ_ASS_PJ, IRR_VIDE_F, IRR_TYPE_F, IRR_SYNTAX, IRR_TAILLE_PJ, IRR_NOM_PJ, IRR_VID_PJ, IRR_EXT_DOC, IRR_TAILLE_F, IRR_ANTIVIRUS]

assert.desc: reason ext fr-ctc-flow6-condition must be a Status-applicable CharacteristicTypeCode (CBB, DIV, DVA, MAJ, MAP, MAPTTC, MNA, MNATTC, ESC, RAB, REM); MEN, MPA, RAP belong on bill.Payment
assert.tests: ext 'fr-ctc-flow6-condition' in [CBB, DIV, DVA, MAJ, MAP, MAPTTC, MNA, MNATTC, ESC, RAB, REM]

assert.desc: action ext fr-ctc-flow6-action must be a known CDAR RequestedActionCode (MDT-121)
assert.tests: ext 'fr-ctc-flow6-action' in [NOA, PIN, NIN, CNF, CNP, CNA, OTH]

assert.desc: party ext fr-ctc-flow6-role must be a recognised CDAR RoleCode
assert.tests: ext 'fr-ctc-flow6-role' in [BY, AB, DL, SE, SR, WK, DFH, PE, PR, II, IV]

assert.desc: party identity ext iso-scheme-id must be one of the Flow 6 allowed schemes
